items.shape_or_design: Curved with repeated circular and ornamental patterns, chain link visible attached
items.estimated_material: yellow metal, likely gold with stones
items.rationale: Highly visible heavy necklace with gold shine and some stone embellishments suggests mostly gold weight with some non-gold volume; estimated weight typical for ornate necklace; 22K purity as common traditional standard; gold rate 12435 INR/g applied with conservative making charge inclusion

items.shape_or_design: Segmented gold units linked together forming chain or necklace
items.rationale: Medium weight linked chain partially overlapped by item_1; less heavy than item_1; gold shine suggests mainly gold; no clear heavy stones; 22K likely for traditional yellow gold

items.shape_or_design: Circular closed loops with detailed patterns on outer surface
items.estimated_material: yellow metal, likely gold with some embedded stones
items.rationale: Three visible stacked bangles; typical traditional gold bangles weight per piece ~10-13 g; patterns and stones reduce solid gold proportion but still significant gold mass; 22K gold purity standard
Small stud earrings typical weight 1.5-2.5 g each; simple design without large stones; gold color matching other items; likely 22K purity

assumptions: Gold rate assumed from Goodreturns 23 March 2026 for 22K gold = 12435 INR/g
Making charges and minor deductions are conservatively included in value estimates
Purity is assumed likely 22K based on traditional yellow gold appearance
Weights are estimated conservatively based on typical jewellery types and visible size
Stones and embellishments reduce gold content but are not separately valued
Each item is counted as separate and not merged even if partially overlapped
